name: Chinese-Style Spicy String Beans
recipeIngredient: 1 pound slender green beans, ends trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the green beans in a large pot of boiling salted water until they are crisp-tender, about 4 minutes.
2. Drain the green beans well.
3. Stir the sesame seeds in a large nonstick skillet over high heat until golden, about 1 minute. Transfer the sesame seeds to a small bowl.
4. Add the hoisin sauce, soy sauce, and chili-garlic sauce to the skillet. Stir the water and cornstarch (dissolved) into the mixture in the skillet.
5. Add the green beans to the skillet. Place over medium-high heat.
6. Toss until the sauce thickens and coats the beans, about 2 minutes.
7. Mix in the chopped green onions.
8. Transfer to a shallow bowl.
9. Sprinkle with sesame seeds.
